commits: feat: install graphify v0.7.13 — AST+semantic graph, PreToolUse hook, auto-rebuild hooks

entries.takeaway: Graphify v0.7.13 goes system-wide across the entire mighty agent stack. The upgrade adds AST-level extraction (no API cost), a PreToolUse hook that forces agents to read the graph before touching source files, and auto-rebuild hooks that keep the graph current after every edit. Agents now have a structural map of the codebase they’re operating in, which measurably reduces hallucinated file paths and redundant searches.
